title: Scope File Tracking — scope-rename, scope-delete, and hook auto-detection

issues.title: Add OpScopeRename and OpScopeDelete op types and payload fields
issues.dod: OpScopeRename and OpScopeDelete constants added to internal/ops/types.go; both added to ValidOpTypes; OldPath/NewPath fields added under '// scope-rename' comment group; DeletedPath field added under '// scope-delete' comment group; go test ./internal/ops/... passes.
acceptance: go test ./internal/ops/... passes
OpScopeRename and OpScopeDelete present in ValidOpTypes map

issues.title: Write failing unit tests for applyScopeRename
issues.dod: Five test functions added to internal/materialize/engine_test.go: TestApplyScopeRenameOp_ExactPath, _GlobPattern, _NoMatch_NoOp (Updated unchanged when no match), _Idempotent, _UnknownIssue_Tolerated. Running these tests fails with 'unknown op type: scope-rename'.
acceptance: go test ./internal/materialize/... -run TestApplyScopeRename fails with 'unknown op type: scope-rename'

issues.title: Write failing unit tests for applyScopeDelete
issues.dod: Four test functions added to internal/materialize/engine_test.go: TestApplyScopeDeleteOp_ExactMatch, _GlobNotRemoved (glob entries survive exact-match delete), _NoMatch_NoOp (Updated unchanged), _UnknownIssue_Tolerated. Running these tests fails with 'unknown op type: scope-delete'.
acceptance: go test ./internal/materialize/... -run TestApplyScopeDelete fails with 'unknown op type: scope-delete'

issues.title: Implement applyScopeRename and applyScopeDelete in materializer (committed together)
issues.dod: applyScopeRename (strings.ReplaceAll per entry, Updated only if changed) and applyScopeDelete (exact match removal, Updated only if changed) implemented in engine.go; both OpScopeRename and OpScopeDelete cases added to ApplyOp switch in the same commit; go test ./internal/materialize/... passes including all new scope tests.
acceptance: go test ./internal/materialize/... passes
all TestApplyScopeRename* and TestApplyScopeDelete* tests pass

issues.title: Narrow W10 phantom scope check to skip terminal-status issues
issues.dod: checkW10PhantomScope in internal/validate/validate.go updated to skip issues with status merged, done, or cancelled; blocked status still checked; three new test functions added covering: terminal statuses skipped, blocked still checked, epics and stories with terminal status also skipped; go test ./internal/validate/... passes.
acceptance: go test ./internal/validate/... -run TestCheckW10Phantom passes
terminal-status issues (merged/done/cancelled) produce no phantom scope warnings

issues.title: Implement arm scope-rename command
issues.dod: arm scope-rename command implemented in cmd/armature/scope_rename.go: empty/equal-arg rejection, no-match warning + exit 0, substring match across all issues, one op per affected issue at same timestamp, rematerializes after writing; registered in main.go; all TestScopeRenameCmd_* tests pass; go test ./cmd/armature/... passes.
acceptance: go test ./cmd/armature/... -run TestScopeRenameCmd passes
arm scope-rename --help shows correct synopsis

issues.title: Implement arm scope-delete command
issues.dod: arm scope-delete command implemented in cmd/armature/scope_delete.go: empty-arg rejection, no-match warning + exit 0, exact-match removal only, empty-scope warning to stderr for non-terminal issues (including blocked), N ops per affected issue at same timestamp, rematerializes after writing; registered in main.go; all TestScopeDeleteCmd_* tests pass.
acceptance: go test ./cmd/armature/... -run TestScopeDeleteCmd passes
arm scope-delete --help shows correct synopsis

issues.title: Extend post-commit hook to detect scope renames and deletions
issues.dod: runPostCommitHook in cmd/armature/hook.go calls hookDetectScopeChanges; hookDetectScopeChanges parses git diff --diff-filter=R and =D from HEAD~1 HEAD, uses strings.HasPrefix(field, 'R') for rename detection, exact match for deletion, emits scope-rename/delete ops per affected issue, skips entirely when HEAD~1 absent, swallows all errors (best-effort); all TestHookPostCommit_* tests pass including new rename/delete/initial-commit tests; go test ./... passes.
acceptance: go test ./cmd/armature/... -run TestHookPostCommit passes
go test ./... passes

issues.title: Update docs/commands.md with scope-delete and scope-rename entries
issues.dod: scope-delete and scope-rename entries added to docs/commands.md between the sources and stale-review sections; each entry has synopsis, behaviour bullets, and examples per the spec; arm validate --ci exits 0.
acceptance: scope-delete and scope-rename sections present in docs/commands.md
sections appear between sources and stale-review in alphabetical order

issues.title: Update skill files with Scope Management documentation
issues.dod: Scope Management section added before Repo Health in skills/armature/SKILL.md; scope maintenance block added to Command Reference in skills/armature-coordinator/SKILL.md; scope maintenance block added to Quick Reference in skills/armature-planner/SKILL.md; all per spec §Documentation Updates.
acceptance: Scope Management section present in skills/armature/SKILL.md before Repo Health
arm scope-rename and arm scope-delete commands appear in coordinator and planner Quick Reference

issues.title: Final verification — make check green and validate clean
issues.dod: make check passes all four stages (lint, test, coverage >=80%, mutate); arm scope-rename --help and arm scope-delete --help show correct output; arm validate confirms no phantom scope lines for merged/done/cancelled issues.
acceptance: make check exits 0
arm validate produces no phantom scope WARNINGs for terminal-status issues
